name: The Back Nine Golf | Lafayette, LA
about: The Back Nine Golf is a golf simulator venue located in Lafayette, LA. The facility offers a modern environment for golfers to practice and play virtual rounds. While specific technical details are not accessible due to website restrictions, the venue appears to be designed for casual and serious golfers looking for an indoor golf experience. Pricing and availability information is not currently public, suggesting reservations may be required.
why_golfers_like_it: Ideal for both practice and play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are typically available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and bar service, but outside food policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical 18-hole simulation times vary but generally take 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Family-friendly policies are not specified, but the venue welcomes diverse groups including families.
